title: U.S. Attacks Iran’s Kharg Island, a Key Port for Oil Exporting, Trump Says
summary_full: The strikes on Kharg Island targeted Iranian military forces, not economic infrastructure on the island, a U.S. military official said.
summary_public: The strikes on Kharg Island targeted Iranian military forces, not economic infrastructure on the island, a U.S. military official said.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: strikes on Kharg Island targeted Iranian military forces
